overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through an urban park area. The player moves from a shaded stone pathway through a skate plaza with graffiti walls, past a red staircase, and into an overgrown area ending at a concrete drainage tunnel. The scene features dense vegetation mixed with urban elements like palm trees, skyscrapers, and neon billboards.

events.description: screen briefly fades to black then returns

massive boulder beside the path
dense canopy of tall trees blocking sky
tall modern building visible through trees
thick green bushes lining the path

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a shaded stone pathway surrounded by dense urban forest. Tall trees create a canopy overhead with modern skyscrapers visible in the distance. The camera walks forward past large rocks and thick foliage before a brief fade to black transition occurs around 5 seconds.

passing by people sitting on benches near the wall

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban skate plaza with a prominent graffiti-covered wall on the left. The wooden deck extends forward with palm trees and futuristic skyscrapers visible in the background. A few people sit on benches along the wall while blue trash bags line the right edge of the walkway.

events.description: passing under red metal arch structure
approaching large staircase with red railings

agents.ego_description: continuing along the plaza walkway passing pedestrians and approaching the red staircase

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket walking toward camera
people ascending the wide red staircase

entered.detail: red metal archway spanning the walkway
wide concrete stairs with red painted railings

segments.scene_description: The walkway continues past a red metal arch structure toward a wide staircase with distinctive red railings on the left. More pedestrians appear, including someone walking toward the camera and others climbing the stairs. The wooden deck continues with trash bags scattered along the right side and tall trees visible beyond the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown urban trail with scattered debris

events.description: leaving wooden plaza for dirt path surrounded by trees
trash bags and overgrown vegetation become prominent along path

agents.ego_description: walking through overgrown urban wilderness with scattered trash bags and dense vegetation

elevated highway or train structure overhead
cluster of massive boulders beside the path
large cylindrical drainage tunnel entrance
rusted metal fence blocking off area

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions back to nature as the wooden plaza gives way to a dirt path through dense overgrowth. A concrete overpass looms overhead while the path winds past large rock formations. Trash bags are scattered throughout the vegetation as the camera approaches a drainage structure in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete drainage tunnel entrance under overpass

events.description: arriving at large concrete tunnel entrance under the overpass

agents.ego_description: approaching the dark tunnel entrance surrounded by trash bags and yellow barricades

entered.detail: large dark drainage tunnel opening in concrete wall
broken metal fence near tunnel entrance
yellow construction barriers blocking path
large concrete pipes emerging from ground

segments.scene_description: The final segment arrives at a concrete drainage tunnel entrance sheltered under the overpass. The lighting becomes darker and more shadowed. Yellow barricade fencing and rusted metal gates block off areas near the tunnel mouth, which is surrounded by accumulated trash bags and large rocks. The tunnel opening looms ahead as the video ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that transitions from a shaded urban forest into a vibrant city plaza before descending into a gritty, overgrown industrial zone. It begins on a stone pathway beneath a dense canopy of trees with skyscrapers looming in the distance, moving forward past thick foliage and large rocks. The scene then opens into a wide wooden skate plaza featuring graffiti-covered walls and palm trees, continuing past a red metal arch and a staircase with distinctive red railings as pedestrians move through the space. As the wooden decking gives way to a dirt path, the environment shifts back toward nature with dense overgrowth and scattered trash bags winding beneath a concrete overpass. Finally, the camera enters a shadowed area sheltered by the overpass, passing yellow barricades and rusted gates to arrive at the mouth of a concrete drainage tunnel.
